_comment: TEMPLATE default channel map — placeholder. Copy to client/web/channel_map.<your-id>.json and edit. One function per motor/channel you control; add more entries to the 'functions' object AND to the layout's 'functions' list in web/layouts.json. Each function maps to a (slot, channel) nibble; values are -7..+7 (0x8 + value). Labels are a per-language object {en,de,zh,ko,es,fr}; en is the fallback.

knob_1._todo: Rename this function, set its real slot/channel, and tune the fields below by driving it.
